Why Aeroclear

Air that works for you

Six reasons Aeroclear earns its place in your home — and pays for itself.

Cleaner air for the whole family

Installed in your central system, Aeroclear treats the air in every room your ducts reach — not just one. Up to 99% of mold, bacteria and viruses neutralized as the air passes through.

Up to 99% neutralized

Real allergy & asthma relief

Continuously reducing spores, bacteria and other airborne irritants means fewer triggers in the air your family breathes every day.

Fewer triggers, every day

Stops mold before it spreads

UV-C targets mold at its favorite home — the damp coil and drain pan — and keeps it from circulating through the house.

Treats the source 24/7

Lower energy bills

A clean coil moves air the way it's supposed to. Better airflow means your system runs more efficiently and costs less to run.

More efficient airflow

Protects your HVAC investment

Less buildup means fewer repairs and a longer life for the expensive equipment you already paid for.

Fewer repairs, longer life

Fresher-smelling home

By breaking down odor-causing buildup in the system, Aeroclear helps clear lingering cooking, pet and musty smells at the source.

Noticeably fresher rooms

Simple by design

Clean air in three steps

We built this for homeowners, not technicians. Once it's in, Aeroclear works quietly every time your system runs.

1

Order online

Free shipping, all 50 states. Arrives ready to install with instructions and live support.

2

Install in an hour

Mounts beside your evaporator coil with standard fittings. Or use our vetted installer network.

3

Treats air 24/7

UV-C light neutralizes mold, bacteria and viruses and keeps the coil clean — automatically.

4

Lamps on autopilot

Join the refill plan and a fresh lamp ships every two years. Skip or adjust anytime.

Real Human Support

US-based air-quality experts, 6 days a week, before and after you buy. No bots, no runaround.

Which Aeroclear fits your home?

Tell us about your system and we'll point you to the right unit. Takes 60 seconds.

Central HVAC

Forced-air system with ductwork — the best fit for whole-home air treatment

Mini-Split

Ductless system in one or more rooms — we have a UV option sized for these

Not Sure

We'll help you figure out what you have and recommend the right unit

Find My Fit →
Questions

The questions everyone asks before they buy

UV-C light at 254nm is a proven germicidal technology — it disrupts the DNA of mold, bacteria and viruses so they can't reproduce. Installed beside your coil, Aeroclear treats both the air passing through and the damp surfaces where mold actually grows. We'll be straight with you about the limits, too: UV-C reduces biological contaminants, but it isn't a particulate filter, so it works best alongside a good HVAC filter, not instead of one. Together they cover the vast majority of what's in your air.

Aeroclear One is built for standard central HVAC with forced-air ductwork, which covers most U.S. homes. It mounts near the evaporator coil at the air handler or furnace. If you have a ductless mini-split, we make a unit sized specifically for those. Not sure what you have? Use the Find My Fit tool above or send us a photo of your system and our team will tell you exactly which unit is right — at no charge.

Most homeowners with basic DIY comfort install it in under an hour. The unit mounts to the ductwork near the coil and wires to a standard 24V transformer (included), with a 120V option in the box. Every order includes step-by-step instructions, a video walkthrough, and direct access to our support team. Prefer a pro? We can recommend a vetted local HVAC tech, and many will add it during a routine service visit.

Musty odors are usually the first thing people notice — often within the first couple of weeks as the system stops recirculating mold and biofilm. Allergy and air-quality improvements build over the following weeks as the coil and drain pan get progressively cleaner. The efficiency and equipment-protection benefits accrue quietly over the life of the system. It's continuous prevention, so the longer it runs, the more it does.

Yes. The UV-C lamp is fully enclosed inside your ductwork, so there's no exposure during normal operation — and like any HVAC service, you turn the system off before opening it up. Aeroclear is validated to UL2998 for zero ozone emissions, so it cleans the air without creating a byproduct you don't want. As with all UV-C HVAC products, you simply switch it off before servicing the unit.

Very little. The UV-C lamp is the only consumable, and it needs replacing about every two years to stay at full strength — a two-minute swap with no tools. The LED status indicator tells you when it's time. Join the refill plan and we'll ship a fresh lamp automatically on schedule, so you never have to track it. The proprietary carbon cells in the Aeroclear One are designed to last the life of the unit.

A portable purifier cleans the single room it sits in, takes up floor space, makes noise, and does nothing for your HVAC system. Aeroclear lives inside your ductwork and treats the air in every room your system reaches, every time it runs — silently and out of sight. It also keeps your coil clean, which a portable unit can't do, helping your system run more efficiently. For whole-home coverage, in-duct treatment is simply a different category of solution.

The 30-day home trial is simple: live with it, and if you're not happy for any reason, contact us within 30 days for a full refund of the purchase price. The 5-year warranty covers manufacturing defects on all unit components — if something fails due to a defect, we repair or replace it. We build these to last and back them accordingly.
